case_title: SMITH, JAMETTA vs. SOUTHBOUND INC. DBA YELLOW AIRPORT AND TOUR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, JAMETTA AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHBOUND INC. DBA YELLOW AIRPORT AND TOUR
